tabs.content:
// Emission rate distribution — binned for histogram
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(emission_rate_kg_s)
| extend rate_bin = bin(emission_rate_kg_s, 0.05)
| summarize Count = count() by rate_bin
| order by rate_bin asc

// Wind speed distribution by confidence
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(wind_speed_ms)
| summarize 
    Count = count(),
    MeanEmission = round(avg(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MeanWindSpeed = round(avg(wind_speed_ms), 2)
  by emission_rate_confidence, wind_aligned

// Wind direction rose — normalized to 0-360, 16-point compass
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(wind_dir_deg)
| extend wind_dir_norm = (wind_dir_deg + 360) % 360
| extend compass_bin = bin(wind_dir_norm, 22.5)
| summarize 
    Count = count(),
    MeanEmission = round(avg(emission_rate_kg_s), 4)
  by compass_bin
| order by compass_bin asc

// Plume geometry — area quantization check
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| summarize Count = count() by area_km2
| order by area_km2 asc

// Elongation distribution
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(elongation)
| extend elong_bin = bin(elongation, 1.0)
| summarize Count = count() by elong_bin
| order by elong_bin asc

// Wind speed vs emission rate — scatter data (high confidence only)
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where emission_rate_confidence == "high" and isnotnull(wind_speed_ms)
| project 
    wind_speed_ms,
    emission_rate_kg_s,
    area_km2,
    elongation,
    source_lat,
    source_lon,
    scene_id,
    plume_id


// Geographic clustering — 0.1 degree grid
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where emission_rate_confidence == "high"
| extend lat_bin = round(source_lat, 1), lon_bin = round(source_lon, 1)
| summarize 
    PlumeCount = count(),
    TotalFlux = round(sum(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MeanFlux = round(avg(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MaxFlux = round(max(emission_rate_kg_s), 4)
  by lat_bin, lon_bin
| order by TotalFlux desc


// Top 20 highest emission plumes
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where emission_rate_confidence == "high" and wind_aligned == true
| top 20 by emission_rate_kg_s desc
| project 
    Rank = row_number(),
    source_lat, source_lon,
    emission_rate_kg_s,
    area_km2, elongation,
    wind_speed_ms, wind_dir_deg,
    angle_plume_wind_deg,
    ime_kg, scene_id, plume_id

// Scene-level aggregation — flux per scene
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where emission_rate_confidence == "high"
| summarize 
    PlumeCount = count(),
    TotalFlux = round(sum(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MeanFlux = round(avg(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MaxFlux = round(max(emission_rate_kg_s), 4),
    MeanArea = round(avg(area_km2), 2)
  by scene_id
| order by TotalFlux desc


// Peak vs mean CH4 concentration ratio
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(max_delta_ch4_ppb) and mean_delta_ch4_ppb > 0
| extend peak_to_mean = round(max_delta_ch4_ppb / mean_delta_ch4_ppb, 3)
| summarize 
    MeanRatio = round(avg(peak_to_mean), 3),
    P50Ratio = round(percentile(peak_to_mean, 50), 3),
    MaxRatio = round(max(peak_to_mean), 3)
  by emission_rate_confidence

// Angle alignment distribution — how well plumes track the wind
external_table("ch4_plume_catalog")
| where isnotnull(angle_plume_wind_deg)
| extend angle_bin = bin(angle_plume_wind_deg, 10)
| summarize Count = count() by angle_bin, emission_rate_confidence
| order by angle_bin asc
tabs.title: Core Analysis Queries
